etymology.interpretation: The character ه›·(jأ¹n, "storing grains") consists of the enclosure ه›—(ه›—) (wأ©i, "enclosure"), which indicates a confined space, and هگ›(هگ›) (jإ«n, "lord"), suggesting phonetic value. This combination conveys the concept of a specialized storage area for grains.
